LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS EXTREME TOWING, INC AND VINCENT MARENTES' MOTION TO CHANGE VENUE IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF FILED THIS ACTION IN THE WRONG COURT BECAUSE THE ACCIDENT OCCURRED AND THE DEFENDANTS RESIDE IN SANTA CLARA COUNTY. THE COURT AWARDS DEFENDANTS $1,380 IN FEES UNDER CCP 396B(B). DEFENDANTS OFFERED TO STIPULATE TO CHANGE VENUE. PLAINTIFF SHOULD HAVE FILED THE ACTION IN THE PROPER COURT AND SUBSEQUENTLY FILED A MOTION BASED ON THE CONVENIENCE OF WITNESSES. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-28-2014 Off Calendar

Mtn To Compel Answers To Form Interoggs Set One
Off Calendar Apr-16-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF LIUDMILA BICHEGKUEVA'S Motion To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories Set One is Off calendar. Venue has been transferred to Santa Clara County. Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Transfer Action And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-20-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS EXTREME TOWING, INC AND VINCENT MARENTES' MOTION to change venue is granted. Plaintiff filed this action in the wrong court because the accident occurred and the defendants reside in Santa Clara County. The Court awards defendants $1,380 in fees under CCP 396b(b). Defendants offered to stipulate to change venue. Plaintiff should have filed the action in the proper court and subsequently filed a motion based on the convenience of witnesses. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
